title: dianthus brachyzonus
intro: Dianthus brachyzonus, also known as the annual pink or pink-stemmed pink, is a perennial plant species within the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing sore throats, relieving congestion, and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, Dianthus brachyzonus can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
